title: 全国村界数据集 / China Village Boundaries Dataset

encoding_notes.default: UTF-8 (.cpg declares UTF-8 for all 58 datasets)
encoding_notes.mixed_encoding: 河北村界、河南村界、陕西村界（4 个数据集）: field names are UTF-8 but field values are GBK. GIS software using .cpg will show correct field names but garbled values, or vice versa.
encoding_notes.truncated_field_names: 广东全省、上海2套: some UTF-8 Chinese field names truncated at DBF 11-byte limit
